ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique external identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "internal_reference" TEXT /* Internal reference code for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "can_be_expensed" INTEGER /* Indicator if the product can be expensed */,
  "can_be_purchased" INTEGER /* Indicator if the product can be purchased */,
  "can_be_sold" INTEGER /* Indicator if the product can be sold */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Selling price of the product */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost price of the product */,
  "supply_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method of supply for the product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the product */,
  "procurement_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the procurement method for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product (for physical goods) */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (for physical goods) */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applicable to the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the product is priced */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supply_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("supply_method_id") REFERENCES supply_methods ("supply_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_procurement_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("procurement_method_id") REFERENCES procurement_methods ("procurement_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_methods" (
  "supply_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply method */,
  "supply_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the supply method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the supply method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supply method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supply method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_methods" (
  "procurement_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement method */,
  "procurement_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the procurement method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the procurement method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the procurement method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the procurement method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procurement_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the product in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who purchased the product */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product purchased */,
  "quantity_purchased" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier who provided the product */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price at which the product was purchased */,
  "purchase_order_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
